bands.label: Compounding
bands.blurb: Full system-led GTM. Advanced plays running.

glossary.ICP: Ideal Customer Profile. The account profile a business is best positioned to win and serve.
glossary.TAM: Total Addressable Market. The full revenue opportunity if every fitting account bought.
glossary.SAM: Serviceable Addressable Market. The slice of TAM you can realistically reach and serve.
glossary.ABM: Account-Based Marketing. Marketing motion that treats individual accounts as a segment of one.
glossary.BANT: Budget, Authority, Need, Timing. A baseline qualification framework.
glossary.MEDDIC: Metrics, Economic buyer, Decision criteria, Decision process, Identify pain, Champion. An enterprise qualification framework.
glossary.MEDDPICC: MEDDIC plus Paper process and Competition. Heavier-weight enterprise qualification.
glossary.CAC: Customer Acquisition Cost. Total sales and marketing spend per new customer.
glossary.LTV: Lifetime Value. Total gross profit a customer generates over their lifecycle.
glossary.CPaaS: Communications Platform as a Service. APIs that let products send messages, calls, and verifications.
glossary.CPQ: Configure, Price, Quote. Software for assembling complex deals into priced quotes.
glossary.GEO: Generative Engine Optimisation. The SEO-for-LLMs work of making content cited by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Gemini.
glossary.QBR: Quarterly Business Review. A structured customer review of value delivered and roadmap.
glossary.TMC: Travel Management Company. The agency layer that manages corporate travel programmes.
glossary.OBT: Online Booking Tool. Self-serve booking software inside corporate travel programmes.
glossary.MQL: Marketing Qualified Lead. A lead that has met marketing thresholds for sales follow-up.
glossary.SQL: Sales Qualified Lead. A lead a salesperson has confirmed is worth pursuing.
